name: Carrots, Cashews and Dates in Yogurt
recipeIngredient: 6 pitted dates, sliced into thin strips
2 tablespoons golden raisins soaked in hot water for 10 minutes, then drained
3 tablespoons dry roasted chopped cashews, almonds or pecans
1 teaspoon grated orange or lime zest
2 tablespoons granulated maple or date sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain yogurt for 2-3 hours using three layers of cheesecloth hung in a bundle to drip into a bowl.
2. Press carrots between your palms to release excess juice. Place the drained yogurt in a 1-quart bowl and whisk until smooth and creamy. Add the remaining ingredients and stir until fully blended. Serve at room temperature or chill for 1-2 hours.
